changelog.changeLog: M1: Moved GO_Crystal_01 MetaLayerAction highlight from onStart (post-VO, too late) to onAwake so the crystal glows immediately when the moment loads
M1: Made onStart VO non-blocking so onRight triggers (and ghost mesh socket) register immediately when moment starts, not after narration finishes

M0: Removed crystal despawn from onAwake so it's visible from frame 1. Replaced onStart with 3x slow flicker cycles (0.7s ON/OFF) for crystal + all 3 bones before Fade VO.
M1: Crystal flickers 2x slowly (0.7s each cycle) before Fade taunts the player. Crystal settles grey before VO then highlighted again by onAwake MetaLayerAction.
M2: All 3 bones flicker together 2x (0.7s cycles) at moment entry before Fade threatens, then outlines activate as guidance before VO.
M3: Island-by-island color cascade on prism touch: Island_1 → 1.5s → Island_2 → 1.5s → Island_3 → 1.0s → RadialTransitionManager (full world). CameraFade and crystal emission happen last.

notes.text: Added Chapter 3: Echoes of Life (M9, M10, M11). verify_story shows 2 violations — both are pre-existing EMPTY_QUERY issues in M0 (The Fading Pulse) onStart actions, not introduced by this edit. Chapter 3 all clear.

Generated "Chromatica: The Fade's Grasp" — 1 chapter "What's Mine", 4 moments. Villain-narrator arc: The Fade speaks with cold contempt → rage → broken desperation → cold retreating threat. All 4 moments verified (0 violations). Saved to chromatica-new.json. Key visual effects: crystal heartbeat blinks (AlphaDesaturateAction), bone sequential flash (RadialStateAction), island color flash+rip back on crystal place, xylophone bone outline escalation (orange → magenta → cyan), prism frantic pulse with loop audio, CameraFade on finale, Colour_Bloom_Flourish on prism activation. Haptics escalate with each bone hit. RadialTransitionManager NOT used (reserved for future chapters). The Fade retreats with cold threat at end of moment 3 — sets up Chapter 2.

Created Chromatica story from scene awareness. 3 chapters (one per island), 12 moments, mystical quest framing. Verify_story passed with 0 violations. SFX: 40/41 generated (1 malformed StopAndSkip placeholder without audioClipName is harmless — it's a stop-audio action, not a play action). Prism 2 target transform (GO_Prism_2_transform) is referenced inside ObjectAnimationAction Data field, which is why it doesn't surface in the top-level SCENE_OBJECTS list — this is correct structure.

objectives: Navigate through three interconnected islands in sequential order
Complete crystal placement tutorial on Island 1
Solve the xylophone musical puzzle by striking bones in sequence
Activate and transport prisms to target transforms
Complete wheel alignment puzzle on Island 2
Collect and place five purple flowers into offering bowl placepoints
Gather and place four crystal shards into well placepoints in order
Restore color to the grey world by linking all three prisms via laser system
Follow UI panel instructions at each puzzle location
procedures: Spawn on Island 1 near GO_Crystal_01 placepoint facing the book area
Place GO_Crystal_01 into GO_Crystal_01 placepoint (socket snap)
Strike GO_Xylophone_Bone_A, GO_Xylophone_Bone_B, and GO_Xylophone_Bone_C with stick to trigger sounds
Touch GO_Prism_01 to activate and send to GO_Prism_1_transform on Tower 1
Grab GO_Wheel_A handle/edge and release to rotate gears (Gear_Set_1 through Gear_Set_5)
Collect PRO_Flower_Purple_01 through PRO_Flower_Purple_05 scattered along path
Place each flower into its corresponding placepoint (Flower_1_pp through Flower_5_pp) on top of the bowl
Touch GO_Prism_02 to activate and send to GO_Prism_2_transform on Tower 2
Grab PRO_Crystal_Shard_01 through PRO_Crystal_Shard_04 near the well
Place each shard into its corresponding placepoint in order (PRO_Crystal_Shard_01 placepoint through PRO_Crystal_Shard_04 placepoint)
Touch GO_Prism_03 to activate and send to GO_Prism_3_transform on Tower 3
Spawn Laser query when all three prisms are placed on towers
Observe laser connecting all three prisms and restoring color to the world
sopContext.constraints: Movement is bounded to individual island landmasses - players cannot leave Island 1 until progressing to Island 2, and cannot leave Island 2 until progressing to Island 3. All interactable objects are spawnable and despawnable via story. Objects in the DECOR/NON-INTERACTABLE section must NEVER have triggers assigned to them and may only be targeted by spawn, despawn, or visual change actions - never ask the player to touch, grab, or interact with these objects. Only GO_Wheel_A is interactable in the wheel group - it works with grab and release interaction to give rotation effect. Flowers (PRO_Flower_Purple_01 through 05) once picked can only be placed in flower placepoints positioned on top of the offering bowl, not directly into the bowl itself. Crystal shards must be placed into well placepoints in order with respect to each sequence. Prism object animations must be added immediately after user touches the prism so they reach their target transforms. The Laser query must only be spawned when all three prisms are placed on top of towers. UI panels support only a single media type (Text OR Image OR Video) and can only be spawned or despawned with no interactions allowed. All UI panels have a default state of Despawned.

moments.name: Place the First Crystal
moments.userAction: Grab GO_Crystal_01 and place into GO_Crystal_01 placepoint
moments.successHint: Crystal_Snap SFX plays, Island_1 gains partial color
moments.spatialContext: Crystal and placepoint near spawn point, placepoint marked with ghost mesh

moments.name: Strike the Xylophone Bones
moments.userAction: Grab GO_Xylophone_Stick and strike GO_Xylophone_Bone_A, GO_Xylophone_Bone_B, GO_Xylophone_Bone_C
moments.successHint: Each bone plays its unique xylophone SFX and becomes colored
moments.spatialContext: Xylophone structure at mid-height on Island 1, stick spawns near bones

moments.name: Activate the First Prism
moments.successHint: Prism animates to Tower 1, Beam_Link_01 SFX plays, bridge to Island 2 opens
moments.spatialContext: Prism spawns near xylophone, Tower 1 visible in background

moments.name: Cross to the Mechanical Island
moments.spatialContext: Player crosses bridge from Island 1 to Island 2

moments.name: Turn the Wheel
moments.userAction: Grab GO_Wheel_A and release to rotate
moments.successHint: Gear animations play with wheel SFX, Island_2 gains color
moments.spatialContext: Wheel positioned at waist height near island center, gears visible behind it

moments.name: Collect and Place the Flowers
moments.userAction: Collect PRO_Flower_Purple_01 through PRO_Flower_Purple_05 and place in Flower_1_pp through Flower_5_pp on GO_Offering_Bowl
moments.successHint: flower_place SFX per placement, task_complete SFX when all five placed
moments.spatialContext: Flowers scattered along path, offering bowl on pedestal with visible placepoints on top

moments.name: Activate the Second Prism
moments.successHint: Prism animates to Tower 2, Beam_Link SFX plays, Flower_garland colors in, bridge to Island 3 opens
moments.spatialContext: Prism spawns near offering bowl, Tower 2 visible across island

moments.name: Enter the Final Island
moments.spatialContext: Player crosses bridge to Island 3, the well visible ahead

moments.name: Place the Crystal Shards in Order
moments.userAction: Grab PRO_Crystal_Shard_01 through PRO_Crystal_Shard_04 and place in PRO_Crystal_Shard_01 placepoint through PRO_Crystal_Shard_04 placepoint in sequence
moments.successHint: Water_Drop_1/2/3/4 SFX per shard placement, Island_3 gains color after all placed
moments.spatialContext: Crystal shards near well pickup area, placepoints arranged around well rim in visible order

moments.name: Activate the Final Prism
moments.successHint: Prism animates to Tower 3, Beam_Link_01 SFX plays
moments.spatialContext: Prism spawns near well after shards complete, Tower 3 visible on island

moments.name: The World Reborn
moments.spatialContext: Laser spawns connecting all three towers, full world color restoration via RadialTransitionManager
